remarks: Located in prime South Wilton just minutes from Westport and New Canaan, this exceptional colonial blends timeless New England charm with today's most sought-after amenities. Thoughtfully upgraded, this home offers 4 spacious bedrooms, 5 well appointed bathrooms, abundance of living space, & a layout ideal for everyday living & entertaining. At the heart of the home is a fully updated kitchen w/ stainless steel appliances, dining area, & direct access to the deck, perfect for indoor-outdoor living. Just off the kitchen, the family room is centered around a wood-burning fireplace & French doors that open to the deck & overlook the private backyard. The main lvl also includes a formal dining room & spacious living room w/ wood-burning fireplace. Upstairs, the luxurious primary bedroom suite serves as a private retreat w/ fireplace, spa-like bathroom & walk-in closet. Each additional bedroom is well-proportioned w/ access to beautifully appointed full baths, offering comfort & privacy, while a large rec/media room offers flexibility for work or play. The lower lvl offers a range of possibilities, w/ plenty of room for an office, gym, or media room. Outside, the expansive deck and backyard provide the perfect setting for entertaining or relaxing. Perfectly located just minutes from top-rated schools, town amenities, and commuter routes, this home offers an exceptional balance of luxury, functionality & convenience.
